# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

gcloud config set compute/zone us-east1-c
gcloud compute instances create dm202-04-03-1 --machine-type n1-standard-1 \
  --image debian-9-stretch-v20180716 --image-project debian-cloud \
  --boot-disk-size 5GB
gcloud compute firewall-rules create dm202-firewall-03 \
      --allow tcp:80,tcp:443 \
      --target-tags dm202-04-03-1,dm202-04-07-1
gcloud compute addresses create dm202-addr --region=us-east1
